artPrompt: An evocative scene of a self-referential racket: a glowing legal aura wrapping a hapless permanent like coils of luminous chain made of blank illegible fine print that loops endlessly back on itself, a goblin enforcer's silhouette standing guard nearby. A single amber lamp catches the shimmering coils while the rain-slick room folds into ink-black noir shadow. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Protection from Being Protected
text:
Enchant permanent
Enchanted permanent has protection from whoever is currently offering it protection, which is you, which means it has protection from your protection, which means it's no longer protected, which means — look, it just can't be targeted by anyone, including the Don, who finds this very funny.
When this Aura enters, you create a Favor token. The premium was paid. The coverage is paradoxical.
flavorText: The fine print refers to itself. The fine print's fine print refers to the fine print. Sign here.
